commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `reasoning` and `antml:reasoning` to hidden reasoning-tag sanitization and tests final assistant text plus embedded block-reply stripping.

PR surface: Source +77, Tests +147. Total +224 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the PR adds `reasoning` to the embedded scanner, and `stripBlockTags` has no literal prose recovery before entering hidden state on an unclosed opener.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align the embedded stream scanner with the final sanitizer and add the missing subscriber regression.

target.title: fix(agents): strip reasoning tags from chat replies
target.body:
## Summary

Addresses the final-sanitizer and embedded chat-delivery parts of #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags in assistant-visible final sanitization.
- Require an exact tag-name boundary so visible XML-ish prose such as `<reasoning-step>` stays visible.
- Keep leading and trailing unclosed `<reasoning>` bodies hidden, while preserving common visible prose mentions such as `The <reasoning> tag ...`, `Use <reasoning> tag ...`, and `Use <antml:reasoning> tag ...`.
- Align embedded stream/block-reply scanners with the shared sanitizer grammar for attribute-bearing and self-closing reasoning tags.

## Root Cause

OpenAI-compatible providers can emit hidden reasoning inside `<reasoning>` blocks. The final assistant text sanitizer and embedded chat delivery scanners recognized older think/thinking/thought tag variants, but did not consistently recognize `reasoning` / `antml:reasoning` with the same boundary and tag-tail rules.

Two concrete delivery gaps are covered here:

1. Final/non-streamed assistant extraction could keep or truncate the wrong text around `<reasoning>` tags.
2. Embedded block-reply delivery could detect a reasoning-looking chunk but fail to strip attribute-bearing tags because `THINKING_TAG_SCAN_RE` only matched bare tags.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Final/non-streamed assistant text and embedded chat block replies now strip hidden `<reasoning>` / `<antml:reasoning>` blocks. Attribute-bearing reasoning open tags are stripped in embedded block replies. Self-closing reasoning tags do not hide following visible text. Visible non-control tags such as `<reasoning-step>` remain visible. Common visible prose mentions of `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` tag names remain visible, while trailing unclosed bodies beginning with `tags should be hidden`, `element should be hidden`, or `block should be hidden` stay hidden.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch at `4ab01dc7e2ae98f41447673770e388146edb885b`, rebased onto `origin/main` `4094ef4dcb81355bb3547d2169b2f83856dc8c79`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran focused regression tests, formatter check, diff whitespace check, and the prompt snapshot check that previously failed in CI.

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot
pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts
git diff --check
node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check
```

Evidence after fix: after-fix focused tests and source-probe-backed regressions show hidden reasoning content is stripped, visible XML-ish prose remains visible, attribute-bearing reasoning tags are handled, self-closing reasoning tags do not swallow following visible text, ordinary singular tag prose mentions are preserved, and the trailing unclosed plural/element/block false positives are hidden.

Final/non-streamed sanitizer output covered by tests:

```json
{"input":"Before<reasoning>internal reasoning</reasoning>After","strip":"BeforeAfter","sanitize":"BeforeAfter","extract":"BeforeAfter"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> tags should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> element should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> block should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <antml:reasoning> tags should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <antml:reasoning> element should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <antml:reasoning> block should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","strip":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","sanitize":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example."}
{"input":"Use <reasoning> tag for this example.","strip":"Use <reasoning> tag for this example.","sanitize":"Use <reasoning> tag for this example."}
{"input":"Use <antml:reasoning> tag for this example.","strip":"Use <antml:reasoning> tag for this example.","sanitize":"Use <antml:reasoning> tag for this example."}
{"input":"<reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"","sanitize":""}
{"input":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","strip":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","sanitize":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","extract":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B"}
```

Embedded scanner helper output covered by existing source probes/regressions:

```json
{"input":"<reasoning hidden=\"1\">secret</reasoning>Visible","matchedTags":["<reasoning hidden=\"1\">","</reasoning>"],"thinkingText":"secret","streamingThinkingText":"secret"}
{"input":"<antml:reasoning hidden=\"1\">secret</antml:reasoning>Visible","matchedTags":["<antml:reasoning hidden=\"1\">","</antml:reasoning>"],"thinkingText":"secret","streamingThinkingText":"secret"}
{"input":"<reasoning/>Visible","matchedTags":["<reasoning/>"],"thinkingText":"","streamingThinkingText":""}
{"input":"<antml:reasoning />Visible","matchedTags":["<antml:reasoning />"],"thinkingText":"","streamingThinkingText":""}
```

Embedded block-reply subscriber regressions:

```text
<reasoning hidden="1">Reasoning chunk that should not leak</reasoning>Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer

<antml:reasoning hidden="1">Reasoning chunk that should not leak</antml:reasoning>Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer

<reasoning/>Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer

<antml:reasoning />Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer
```

Observed result after fix: Closed reasoning blocks are removed from visible assistant text; singular literal standalone tag mentions survive final/non-stream extraction; leading and trailing unclosed reasoning text stay hidden; trailing unclosed `tags` / `element` / `block` suffixes stay hidden; attribute-bearing reasoning tags are stripped from embedded block replies; self-closing reasoning tags do not swallow following visible text; embedded subscriber coverage includes `reasoning` and `antml:reasoning` block replies. The previous CI prompt snapshot drift is resolved by rebasing onto current `origin/main`, where `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check` reports snapshots current.

What was not tested: Full repository suite, live MiniMax/LiteLLM reproduction, and the shared OpenAI-completions stream partitioner path. This PR body does not claim that `createReasoningTagTextPartitioner()` was repaired; this scoped patch proves the final/non-streamed sanitizer path and embedded block-reply delivery path.

## Verification

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot
-> 5 files / 325 tests passed

pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts
-> passed

git diff --check
-> passed

node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check
-> Prompt snapshots are current (7 files)
```

GitHub CI for `4ab01dc7e2ae98f41447673770e388146edb885b` was not complete when this body was updated.

commands.author: MonkeyLeeT

target.title: fix(agents): strip reasoning tags from chat replies
target.body:
## Summary

Addresses the final-sanitizer and embedded chat-delivery parts of #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags in assistant-visible final sanitization.
- Require an exact tag-name boundary so visible XML-ish prose such as `<reasoning-step>` stays visible.
- Keep leading and trailing unclosed `<reasoning>` bodies hidden, while preserving common visible prose mentions such as `The <reasoning> tag ...`, `Use <reasoning> tag ...`, and `Use <antml:reasoning> tag ...`.
- Align embedded stream/block-reply scanners with the shared sanitizer grammar for attribute-bearing and self-closing reasoning tags.

## Root Cause

OpenAI-compatible providers can emit hidden reasoning inside `<reasoning>` blocks. The final assistant text sanitizer and embedded chat delivery scanners recognized older think/thinking/thought tag variants, but did not consistently recognize `reasoning` / `antml:reasoning` with the same boundary and tag-tail rules.

Two concrete delivery gaps are covered here:

1. Final/non-streamed assistant extraction could keep or truncate the wrong text around `<reasoning>` tags.
2. Embedded block-reply delivery could detect a reasoning-looking chunk but fail to strip attribute-bearing tags because `THINKING_TAG_SCAN_RE` only matched bare tags.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Final/non-streamed assistant text and embedded chat block replies now strip hidden `<reasoning>` / `<antml:reasoning>` blocks. Attribute-bearing reasoning open tags are stripped in embedded block replies. Self-closing reasoning tags do not hide following visible text. Visible non-control tags such as `<reasoning-step>` remain visible. Common visible prose mentions of `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` tag names remain visible, while trailing unclosed bodies beginning with `tags should be hidden`, `element should be hidden`, or `block should be hidden` stay hidden.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch at `4ab01dc7e2ae98f41447673770e388146edb885b`, rebased onto `origin/main` `4094ef4dcb81355bb3547d2169b2f83856dc8c79`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran focused regression tests, formatter check, diff whitespace check, and the prompt snapshot check that previously failed in CI.

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot
pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts
git diff --check
node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check
```

Evidence after fix: after-fix focused tests and source-probe-backed regressions show hidden reasoning content is stripped, visible XML-ish prose remains visible, attribute-bearing reasoning tags are handled, self-closing reasoning tags do not swallow following visible text, ordinary singular tag prose mentions are preserved, and the trailing unclosed plural/element/block false positives are hidden.

Final/non-streamed sanitizer output covered by tests:

```json

{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> tags should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> element should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> block should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <antml:reasoning> tags should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <antml:reasoning> element should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"Visible prefix <antml:reasoning> block should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","strip":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","sanitize":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example."}
{"input":"Use <reasoning> tag for this example.","strip":"Use <reasoning> tag for this example.","sanitize":"Use <reasoning> tag for this example."}
{"input":"Use <antml:reasoning> tag for this example.","strip":"Use <antml:reasoning> tag for this example.","sanitize":"Use <antml:reasoning> tag for this example."}
{"input":"<reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"","sanitize":""}
{"input":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","strip":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","sanitize":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B","extract":"A <reasoning-step>visible</reasoning-step> B"}
```

Embedded scanner helper output covered by existing source probes/regressions:

```json
{"input":"<reasoning hidden=\"1\">secret</reasoning>Visible","matchedTags":["<reasoning hidden=\"1\">","</reasoning>"],"thinkingText":"secret","streamingThinkingText":"secret"}
{"input":"<antml:reasoning hidden=\"1\">secret</antml:reasoning>Visible","matchedTags":["<antml:reasoning hidden=\"1\">","</antml:reasoning>"],"thinkingText":"secret","streamingThinkingText":"secret"}
{"input":"<reasoning/>Visible","matchedTags":["<reasoning/>"],"thinkingText":"","streamingThinkingText":""}
{"input":"<antml:reasoning />Visible","matchedTags":["<antml:reasoning />"],"thinkingText":"","streamingThinkingText":""}
```

Embedded block-reply subscriber regressions:

```text
<reasoning hidden="1">Reasoning chunk that should not leak</reasoning>Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer

<antml:reasoning hidden="1">Reasoning chunk that should not leak</antml:reasoning>Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer

<reasoning/>Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer

<antml:reasoning />Final answer
=> block reply: Final answer
```

Observed result after fix: Closed reasoning blocks are removed from visible assistant text; singular literal standalone tag mentions survive final/non-stream extraction; leading and trailing unclosed reasoning text stay hidden; trailing unclosed `tags` / `element` / `block` suffixes stay hidden; attribute-bearing reasoning tags are stripped from embedded block replies; self-closing reasoning tags do not swallow following visible text; embedded subscriber coverage includes `reasoning` and `antml:reasoning` block replies. The previous CI prompt snapshot drift is resolved by rebasing onto current `origin/main`, where `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check` reports snapshots current.

What was not tested: Full repository suite, live MiniMax/LiteLLM reproduction, and the shared OpenAI-completions stream partitioner path. This PR body does not claim that `createReasoningTagTextPartitioner()` was repaired; this scoped patch proves the final/non-streamed sanitizer path and embedded block-reply delivery path.

## Verification
